name: pokeworld
description: Pokeworld dev orchestration — worktree-aware PM2 flow for the api + frontend stack (see scripts/worktree-ports.cjs).

scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix api && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.frontend: cd frontend && NODE_OPTIONS=--openssl-legacy-provider API=http://localhost:3847/v1 PORT=3000 yarn dev
